651 GG0130C2_TOILT_GOAL_BY_END_CD GG0130C2_TOILT_GOAL_BY_END_CD GG0130C2 Self Care: Toileting Hygiene Goal by End of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's goal to perform toileting hygiene tasks by the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate assistance
 04=Supervision or touching
